# Avalonia UI 框架使用指南

## 概述

Avalonia UI 是基于 .NET 的现代跨平台桌面应用框架，为项目从 Consolonia TUI 迁移到现代 GUI 提供强大支持。本框架结合了 WPF 的成熟模式和现代化的设计理念。

## 技术栈

- **基础框架**: Avalonia UI 11.x
- **UI 标记**: XAML (.axaml 文件)
- **数据绑定**: MVVM 模式
- **样式系统**: CSS-like 选择器 + Fluent Design
- **布局系统**: Grid, StackPanel, DockPanel, Canvas 等
- **控件库**: 丰富的现代化控件集合

## 项目结构分析

### 1. 应用程序入口点

```csharp
// Program.cs
public static AppBuilder BuildAvaloniaApp()
{
    return AppBuilder.Configure<App>()
        .UsePlatformDetect()           // 自动检测平台
        .WithInterFont()               // 使用 Inter 字体
        .LogToTrace()                  // 日志输出
        .UseContainerServices();       // 依赖注入
}

public static void Main(string[] args)
{
    BuildAvaloniaApp()
        .StartWithClassicDesktopLifetime(args);
}
```

### 2. 应用程序配置

```xml
<!-- App.axaml -->
<Application xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             x:Class="DotNetCampus.Terminal.App"
             RequestedThemeVariant="Default">
    <Application.Styles>
        <FluentTheme />
    </Application.Styles>
    <Application.Resources>
        <!-- 全局资源 -->
    </Application.Resources>
</Application>
```

### 3. 主窗口结构

```xml
<!-- MainWindow.axaml -->
<Window xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
        x:Class="DotNetCampus.Terminal.Views.MainWindow"
        Title="DotNetCampus Terminal"
        Width="1200" Height="800"
        MinWidth="800" MinHeight="600"
        Icon="/Assets/app-icon.ico">
    <views:MainView />
</Window>
```

**注意**: 与 Consolonia 不同，MainWindow 现在是真正的应用窗口，MainView 作为主要内容区域。

## 核心概念

### 1. 命名空间

```xml
xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
xmlns:vm="using:DotNetCampus.Terminal.ViewModels"
xmlns:views="using:DotNetCampus.Terminal.Views"
```

### 2. 测量单位

**重要**: GUI 程序中的测量单位基于设备无关像素：
- `Width="200"` 表示 200 个设备无关像素
- `Height="100"` 表示 100 个设备无关像素
- `Padding="10 5"` 表示左右10像素，上下5像素间距
- `Margin="5 10 5 10"` 表示左上右下的边距

### 3. 主题系统

- `FluentTheme`: 现代 Fluent Design 主题
- `RequestedThemeVariant`: Light/Dark/Default 主题变体

### 4. 布局控件

#### Grid 布局（推荐）
```xml
<Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="300,*">
    <!-- 标题栏 -->
    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" 
               Text="DotNetCampus Terminal" 
               Classes="h1" />
    
    <!-- 左侧设备树 -->
    <TreeView Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" 
              ItemsSource="{Binding RemoteDevices}" />
    
    <!-- 右侧内容区 -->
    <ContentControl Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" 
                    Content="{Binding SelectedItem}" />
    
    <!-- 状态栏 -->
    <StatusBar Grid.Row="2" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" />
</Grid>
```

#### DockPanel 布局
```xml
<DockPanel>
    <Menu DockPanel.Dock="Top" />
    <StatusBar DockPanel.Dock="Bottom" />
    <TreeView DockPanel.Dock="Left" Width="250" />
    <ContentControl />
</DockPanel>
```

### 5. 现代化控件特性

#### 带图标的按钮
```xml
<Button Classes="accent">
    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
        <PathIcon Data="{StaticResource ConnectIcon}" />
        <TextBlock Text="连接" />
    </StackPanel>
</Button>
```

#### 工具提示
```xml
<Button ToolTip.Tip="连接到远程设备">
    <PathIcon Data="{StaticResource ConnectIcon}" />
</Button>
```

#### 上下文菜单
```xml
<TreeView>
    <TreeView.ContextFlyout>
        <MenuFlyout>
            <MenuItem Header="连接" />
            <MenuItem Header="编辑" />
            <Separator />
            <MenuItem Header="删除" />
        </MenuFlyout>
    </TreeView.ContextFlyout>
</TreeView>
```

## 样式系统

### 1. Fluent Design 样式

```xml
<Style Selector="Button.accent">
    <Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource SystemAccentColor}" />
    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="{DynamicResource SystemAccentColorForeground}" />
    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{DynamicResource SystemAccentColor}" />
</Style>

<Style Selector="TextBlock.h1">
    <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="28" />
    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Light" />
    <Setter Property="Margin" Value="0 0 0 20" />
</Style>
```

### 2. 现代化视觉效果

```xml
<Style Selector="Border.card">
    <Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource CardBackgroundFillColorDefaultBrush}" />
    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="{DynamicResource CardStrokeColorDefaultBrush}" />
    <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1" />
    <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="8" />
    <Setter Property="Padding" Value="16" />
    <Setter Property="BoxShadow" Value="0 2 8 0 #1A000000" />
</Style>
```

### 3. 动画和过渡

```xml
<Style Selector="Button:pointerover">
    <Style.Animations>
        <Animation Duration="0:0:0.2" FillMode="Forward">
            <KeyFrame Cue="0%">
                <Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource ButtonBackgroundPointerOver}" />
            </KeyFrame>
            <KeyFrame Cue="100%">
                <Setter Property="Background" Value="{DynamicResource ButtonBackgroundPointerOver}" />
            </KeyFrame>
        </Animation>
    </Style.Animations>
</Style>
```

## 数据绑定

### 1. 强类型绑定

```xml
<!-- 启用编译时检查 -->
<TextBlock Text="{Binding DeviceName, Mode=OneWay}" 
           x:DataType="vm:DeviceViewModel" />

<!-- 性能优化的绑定 -->
<TextBlock Text="{Binding Info.Name, Mode=OneTime}" 
           x:DataType="vm:SshRemoteDeviceInfoNode" />
```

### 2. 现代化转换器

```xml
<!-- 在 UserControl.Resources 中定义 -->
<converters:ConnectionStateToIconConverter x:Key="StateToIconConverter" />
<converters:BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVisibilityConverter" />

<!-- 在绑定中使用 -->
<PathIcon Data="{Binding ConnectionState, Converter={StaticResource StateToIconConverter}}" 
          Foreground="{Binding ConnectionState, Converter={StaticResource StateToBrushConverter}}" />

<ProgressBar IsVisible="{Binding IsConnecting, Converter={StaticResource BoolToVisibilityConverter}}" />
```

### 3. 复杂数据模板

```xml
<TreeView.DataTemplates>
    <DataTemplate x:DataType="vm:SshRemoteDeviceInfoNode">
        <Border Classes="card" Margin="2">
            <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                <!-- 连接状态指示器 -->
                <Ellipse Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" 
                         Width="12" Height="12" 
                         Fill="{Binding ConnectionState, Converter={StaticResource StateToBrushConverter}}" />
                
                <!-- 设备名称 -->
                <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" 
                           Text="{Binding Info.Name}" 
                           Classes="subtitle" 
                           Margin="8 0" />
                
                <!-- 收藏按钮 -->
                <ToggleButton Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="2" 
                              IsChecked="{Binding IsFavorite}" 
                              Classes="favorite-icon" />
                
                <!-- 详细信息 -->
                <TextBlock Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Grid.ColumnSpan="2"
                           Text="{Binding Info.Host}" 
                           Classes="caption" 
                           Foreground="{DynamicResource TextFillColorSecondaryBrush}" 
                           Margin="8 4 0 0" />
            </Grid>
        </Border>
    </DataTemplate>
</TreeView.DataTemplates>
```

## 高级控件

### 1. 现代化 TreeView

```xml
<TreeView ItemsSource="{Binding RemoteDevices}"
          SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}"
          AutoScrollToSelectedItem="True">
    
    <TreeView.ItemTemplate>
        <TreeDataTemplate ItemsSource="{Binding Children}">
            <ContentControl Content="{Binding}" />
        </TreeDataTemplate>
    </TreeView.ItemTemplate>
    
    <!-- 自定义样式 -->
    <TreeView.Styles>
        <Style Selector="TreeViewItem">
            <Setter Property="IsExpanded" Value="True" />
        </Style>
    </TreeView.Styles>
</TreeView>
```

### 2. 分页控件

```xml
<TabControl TabStripPlacement="Top">
    <TabItem Header="设备管理">
        <TabItem.HeaderTemplate>
            <DataTemplate>
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                    <PathIcon Data="{StaticResource DeviceIcon}" />
                    <TextBlock Text="设备管理" />
                </StackPanel>
            </DataTemplate>
        </TabItem.HeaderTemplate>
        <views:DeviceManagementView />
    </TabItem>
    
    <TabItem Header="外壳">
        <TabItem.HeaderTemplate>
            <DataTemplate>
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                    <PathIcon Data="{StaticResource TerminalIcon}" />
                    <TextBlock Text="外壳" />
                </StackPanel>
            </DataTemplate>
        </TabItem.HeaderTemplate>
        <views:ShellView />
    </TabItem>
</TabControl>
```

### 3. 状态栏

```xml
<StatusBar>
    <StatusBar.ItemsPanel>
        <ItemsPanelTemplate>
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto,Auto">
            </Grid>
        </ItemsPanelTemplate>
    </StatusBar.ItemsPanel>
    
    <!-- 状态文本 -->
    <StatusBarItem Grid.Column="0">
        <TextBlock Text="{Binding StatusText}" />
    </StatusBarItem>
    
    <!-- 连接状态 -->
    <StatusBarItem Grid.Column="1">
        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="4">
            <Ellipse Width="8" Height="8" 
                     Fill="{Binding ConnectionState, Converter={StaticResource StateToBrushConverter}}" />
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding OnlineDeviceCount, StringFormat='在线: {0}'}" />
        </StackPanel>
    </StatusBarItem>
    
    <!-- 进度指示器 -->
    <StatusBarItem Grid.Column="2">
        <ProgressBar Width="100" Height="4" 
                     Value="{Binding Progress}" 
                     IsVisible="{Binding IsOperationRunning}" />
    </StatusBarItem>
    
    <!-- 时间显示 -->
    <StatusBarItem Grid.Column="3">
        <TextBlock Text="{Binding CurrentTime, StringFormat='HH:mm:ss'}" />
    </StatusBarItem>
</StatusBar>
```

## MVVM 模式

### 1. 现代化 ViewModel

```csharp
public record DeviceViewModel : BindableRecord
{
    private string _name = string.Empty;
    private ConnectionState _state;
    private bool _isConnecting;
    
    public string Name
    {
        get => _name;
        set => SetField(ref _name, value);
    }
    
    public ConnectionState State
    {
        get => _state;
        set => SetField(ref _state, value);
    }
    
    public bool IsConnecting
    {
        get => _isConnecting;
        set => SetField(ref _isConnecting, value);
    }
    
    // 计算属性
    public string StatusText => State switch
    {
        ConnectionState.Online => "已连接",
        ConnectionState.Offline => "离线",
        ConnectionState.Testing => "连接中...",
        _ => "未知"
    };
}
```

### 2. 异步命令增强

```csharp
public AsyncCommand<DeviceInfo> ConnectCommand { get; }
public AsyncCommand RefreshAllCommand { get; }

public MainViewModel()
{
    ConnectCommand = new AsyncCommand<DeviceInfo>(OnConnectAsync, CanConnect);
    RefreshAllCommand = new AsyncCommand(OnRefreshAllAsync);
}

private bool CanConnect(DeviceInfo? device) => device != null && !IsConnecting;

private async Task OnConnectAsync(DeviceInfo device)
{
    IsConnecting = true;
    try
    {
        await _connectionService.ConnectAsync(device);
    }
    finally
    {
        IsConnecting = false;
    }
}
```

### 3. 集合操作

```csharp
// 使用 AvaloniaList 获得更好的性能
public AvaloniaList<DeviceNode> Devices { get; } = [];

// 过滤和排序
public ICollectionView DevicesView { get; }

public MainViewModel()
{
    DevicesView = new CollectionViewSource { Source = Devices }.View;
    DevicesView.Filter = FilterDevices;
    DevicesView.SortDescriptions.Add(new SortDescription(nameof(DeviceNode.Name), ListSortDirection.Ascending));
}

private bool FilterDevices(object item)
{
    return item is DeviceNode device && device.Name.Contains(SearchText, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
}
```

## 依赖注入集成

### 1. 现代化服务配置

```csharp
public static AppBuilder UseContainerServices(this AppBuilder appBuilder)
{
    return appBuilder.UseContainer(serviceCollection =>
    {
        // 配置服务
        serviceCollection.AddSingleton<IConfigurationManager, ConfigurationManager>();
        serviceCollection.AddSingleton<IConnectionService, SshConnectionService>();
        serviceCollection.AddTransient<MainViewModel>();
        
        // 视图注册
        serviceCollection.AddTransient<MainWindow>();
        serviceCollection.AddTransient<MainView>();
    });
}
```

### 2. 视图模型工厂

```csharp
public class ViewModelFactory
{
    private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
    
    public ViewModelFactory(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
    {
        _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;
    }
    
    public T CreateViewModel<T>() where T : class
    {
        return _serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<T>();
    }
}
```

## 线程和异步操作

### 1. UI 线程调度增强

```csharp
// 使用现代化的异步模式
await Dispatcher.UIThread.InvokeAsync(async () =>
{
    ConnectionState = ConnectionState.Testing;
    var result = await TestConnectionAsync();
    ConnectionState = result ? ConnectionState.Online : ConnectionState.Offline;
});
```

### 2. 取消令牌支持

```csharp
private CancellationTokenSource? _cancellationTokenSource;

public async Task ConnectAsync()
{
    _cancellationTokenSource?.Cancel();
    _cancellationTokenSource = new CancellationTokenSource();
    
    try
    {
        await _connectionService.ConnectAsync(_cancellationTokenSource.Token);
    }
    catch (OperationCanceledException)
    {
        // 操作被取消
    }
}
```

## 性能优化

### 1. 虚拟化增强

```xml
<TreeView VirtualizationMode="Standard">
    <TreeView.ItemsPanel>
        <ItemsPanelTemplate>
            <VirtualizingStackPanel />
        </ItemsPanelTemplate>
    </TreeView.ItemsPanel>
</TreeView>
```

### 2. 编译时绑定

```xml
<!-- 启用编译时检查和优化 -->
<TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}" x:DataType="vm:DeviceViewModel" />
<TextBlock Text="{CompiledBinding Status}" x:DataType="vm:DeviceViewModel" />
```

### 3. 资源优化

```xml
<Application.Resources>
    <!-- 共享资源避免重复创建 -->
    <PathGeometry x:Key="ConnectIconData">M10,2L14,6L10,10L8,8L11,5L8,2L10,2Z</PathGeometry>
    <PathGeometry x:Key="DisconnectIconData">M8,2L12,6L8,10L6,8L9,5L6,2L8,2Z</PathGeometry>
</Application.Resources>
```

## 现代化特性

### 1. 响应式设计

```xml
<UserControl>
    <UserControl.Styles>
        <!-- 窄屏幕适配 -->
        <Style Selector="^[Width<600] TreeView">
            <Setter Property="IsVisible" Value="False" />
        </Style>
        
        <!-- 宽屏幕布局 -->
        <Style Selector="^[Width>=1200] Grid">
            <Setter Property="ColumnDefinitions" Value="300,*,300" />
        </Style>
    </UserControl.Styles>
</UserControl>
```

### 2. 深色主题支持

```xml
<UserControl.Styles>
    <!-- 深色主题适配 -->
    <Style Selector="^[Theme=Dark] Border">
        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2D2D30" />
        <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#404040" />
    </Style>
</UserControl.Styles>
```

### 3. 可访问性支持

```xml
<Button AutomationProperties.Name="连接设备"
        AutomationProperties.HelpText="连接到当前选定的远程设备">
    <PathIcon Data="{StaticResource ConnectIcon}" />
</Button>
```

## 总结

Avalonia UI 为项目提供了从 Consolonia TUI 到现代 GUI 的完整升级路径，带来了：

### 主要优势
- **丰富的视觉体验**: 图标、动画、现代化UI控件
- **更好的交互性**: 鼠标、键盘、触摸等多种输入支持
- **高性能**: 硬件加速渲染和虚拟化
- **可扩展性**: 灵活的样式系统和主题支持
- **跨平台**: Windows、macOS、Linux 支持

### 保持的连续性
- **XAML语法**: 基本兼容，迁移成本低
- **MVVM模式**: 架构保持不变
- **数据绑定**: 语法基本一致，性能更优
- **依赖注入**: 模式保持，功能增强

这个框架指南为UI界面设计师提供了完整的Avalonia开发知识，支持高质量的现代桌面应用开发。
